_comment: Opportunity: Fallen Beast Territory. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 100 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Core Formation), perception (Nascent Soul (to perceive the hoard)), and luck (modifier 1.1). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Fallen Beast Territory
description: A territory left vacant by a fallen apex beast, rich in treasures. Exists because: apex beasts hoard treasures; their fall leaves the hoard.
why_untaken: Other beasts claim the territory quickly.
natural_next_event: Other beasts claim the territory; hoard scattered.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
